title: astragalus fraxinifolius
intro: Astragalus fraxinifolius, also known as the "horse schrankia," is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health, and can be used to treat conditions like bronchitis, pneumonia, and kidney disease. Astragalus fraxinifolius can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
